nasb.text: They led Jesus away to the high priest; and all the chief priests and the elders and the scribes *gathered together.

esv.text: And they led Jesus to the high priest. And all the chief priests and the elders and the scribes came together.

cnv.text: 他們把耶穌押到大祭司那裡，所有的祭司長、長老和經學家都聚集在一起。

ccb.text: 他们把耶稣押到大祭司那里，众祭司长、长老和律法教师都来了。

csbs.text: 他们把耶稣带到大祭司那里。所有的祭司长、长老和经文士都聚在一起。
